title: Calendly to auto populate Lead board in monday.com
excerpt: I was trying to integrate Monday.com to Calendly, some video tutorials are very helpful. What I was trying to figure out, if Calendly can auto populate the Lead board in the monday.com CRM once a lead comes in in Calendl…

posts.author: Nekzner (Karen Aritcheta)
posts.cookedHtml: I was trying to integrate Monday.com to Calendly, some video tutorials are very helpful. What I was trying to figure out, if Calendly can auto populate the Lead board in the monday.com CRM once a lead comes in in Calendly? Or is there a way to automate it?

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
Yes it’s possible over Make.com

image1106×427 32.1 KB

Do you think you can set it up yourself? If you like, I can share the blueprint in a PM.

Best Simon

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Nekzner! Hopefully, the fantastic @simon_blinno’s suggestions helped but if not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
